title: Protecting the New Premium Granite Cobblestones: Active Movers' Commitment to Damage-Free Loading Zones
excerpt: Premium granite cobblestones protection: damage-free loading zones, Active Movers floor protection, new boulevard infrastructure, responsible moving Addis Ababa 2026.
content:
Protecting the new premium granite cobblestones: Active Movers' commitment to damage-free loading zones

New premium granite cobblestones beautify Addis boulevards—and chip under metal dollies, oil drips, and careless tailgate drops. Active Movers treats upgraded public realm as client equal to household goods: plywood runners, rubber wheel dollies, fluid containment, and crews who know municipality fines now target damage not just obstruction.

This guide explains damage-free loading zone practices on premium granite cobblestone streets.

Why granite cobble differs from old stone

  • Factory-cut edges chip sharper under point load.
  • Joint sand displaces under repeated dolly passes—trip hazard liability.
  • Oil and hydraulic fluid stain light granite visibly.
  • Restoration cost billed to contractor if negligent—moving companies included.

Active Movers protection kit

Plywood track from truck to door minimum; thicker Masonite on turns. Rubber-tired dollies only—no steel wheel warehouse cart. Tailgate descent controlled—never drop furniture on stone. Drip pans under truck if minor leak suspected.

Staging discipline

No carton drag on cobble—lift or hand-cart with pneumatic wheels. Spotter prevents corner cut across unprotected stone. Rain: cobble slick—slower pass, more runners.

Coordination with traffic officers

Request protection acknowledgment when staging permitted—shows good faith if dispute arises. Photo pre-load stone condition timestamped.

Client compound continuity

Extend runners inside gate if new cobble driveway—same rules private and public.

Insurance and liability awareness

Infrastructure damage exclusion may apply—prevention cheaper than claim denial.

Training standard 2026

All Active Movers crews cobble-certified module—refresher each Kremt season.

Conclusion

Premium granite cobble survives moves when runners precede wheels, dollies stay rubber, fluids stay contained—Active Movers damage-free loading protects city investment and client liability alike.
author: Active Movers Team
